raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX I made two payments on my Citi Bank Best Buy card of {$75.00} each, so {$150.00} total. Then on XX/XX/XXXX another {$150.00} payment was made that was not me. That payment was reversed on XX/XX/XXXX, at this point I figured there was a clerical error. Then on XX/XX/XXXX another reversal happened of {$150.00}. I contacted Citi bank several times since then, they have admitted fault and promised resolution 3 times now. First time was in XXXX all over the phone. The second time was in XXXX where they stated that they had issued a refund, but I did not receive it. At that time they requested and I provided my bank statements showing that I did not receive any money from them. The last time I spoke with them was XX/XX/XXXX, where they said it had to go through their fraud department and that it would take 90 days. They did not mention that this would have to go through fraud at any point prior. They admitted at some point they changed my SSN on their records and allowed someone else to handle my account. They even stated that they spoke with that person recently. 
Because of their mess up my credit limit and thus my credit score have been tanked. There is serious mismanagement with how they handle their issues and it is only causing harm to me.
